item.title: Gut-Brain Axis Dysregulation in Inflammatory Bowel Disease: Implications for Coagulation Abnormalities and Extraintestinal Manifestations.
item.description: International journal of general medicine - Review - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) involves chronic intestinal inflammation driven by gut-brain axis imbalance, fostering complications through an "inflammation-neuro-coagulation" triad. Current stag...

item.title: On the increased prevalence of myasthenia gravis in patients with inflammatory bowel disease.
Beyond numbers: challenges in assessing myasthenia gravis prevalence in inflammatory bowel disease.
Primary sclerosing cholangitis.
item.description: Lancet (London, England) - Review - Primary sclerosing cholangitis is a rare, chronic cholestatic liver disease characterised by biliary inflammation and fibrosis. Inflammatory bowel disease co-occurs in 50-80% of individuals with pr...
